test.observation: FAILED: cos_sim=0.483355 < 0.99 required. The test validates the standalone kernel (kernel_p2p_allreduce_compressed.so) but the fix feature only modified the fused kernel (gemv_int4_p2p_allreduce_rmsnorm_compressed.hip).

typecheck.observation: All Python files compile without syntax errors

lint.command: N/A - no lint tools (ruff/pylint/flake8) available in dev container
lint.observation: Lint tools not available in Docker environment

blockingIssues.description: Critical kernel/test mismatch: The fix feature modified gemv_int4_p2p_allreduce_rmsnorm_compressed.hip (FUSED kernel) but the validation test (test_compressed_allreduce_working.py) tests kernel_p2p_allreduce_compressed.hip (STANDALONE kernel). The standalone kernel was NOT fixed and still produces cos_sim=0.48. Either: (1) fix the standalone kernel's dequantization logic, or (2) use a test that validates the fused kernel.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Apply the same dequantization fixes to kernel_p2p_allreduce_compressed.hip's kernel_dequantize_sum_with_residual_fp32 function that were applied to the fused kernel, OR create a proper test for the fused kernel that can handle its cross-WG synchronization requirements.

blockingIssues.description: Original feature was never properly validated on the dev server. The fix feature attempted to address bugs but tested the wrong kernel.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The gpu-kernel-worker skill should require explicit verification that the test being run actually validates the code being modified. Workers should check that test file names match the kernel being tested.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-compressed-kernel-correctness worker modified fused kernel but validation test tested standalone kernel. The mismatch was not caught during the fix feature implementation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance that compressed allreduce has TWO kernel variants (standalone and fused) that must be validated separately. Changes to one do not affect the other.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker noted Python threading tests produce NaN for fused kernel
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a known limitation but the test_compressed_allreduce_working.py tests the standalone kernel which should work with threading - the actual issue is kernel/test mismatch
